findings.note: Attach-after-shell remains in waiting-to-reconnect/no-debuggee state and does not produce a live kernel debuggee.
KD can reach a kernel-connected state during guest restart, but transport degrades into breakin/communication errors.
CDB did not improve the VMware serial transport path; current runs failed before producing usable logs.

recommended_next_actions: Keep WinDbg single-key arbitration paused until a boot-time profile can keep kernel connectivity without transport errors.
Move from frontend experiments to serial transport configuration variants and start-order experiments.
Treat attach-after-shell as a no-debuggee observation path, not as an arbiter-capable debug session.
